n.description: Number of employees polled, i.e., the number of trials in the binomial experiment

p.description: Probability that any given employee favors unionization (success probability in the binomial model)

P_x_leq_11.description: Cumulative binomial probability P(x ≤ 11) read from Table I at n=20, p=0.60, k=11

P_x_leq_10.description: Cumulative binomial probability P(x ≤ 10) read from Table I at n=20, p=0.60, k=10
